title: Create Ore Crushing Fix
description: Optimized Create's crushing recipe for some mods
body:
### This DataPack has the following features

1. Mods Stone ore and Deepslate ore crushing recipe optimization.
2. Add variant tag to ores to solve recipe [problems](https://github.com/AlmostReliable/almostunified/issues/51) that occur when using [Almost Unified](https://modrinth.com/mod/almost-unified).

Temporarily only support [Thermal Foundation](https://modrinth.com/mod/thermal-foundation), [Immersive Engineering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering), [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism), [All the Ores](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ato), [Blue Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/blue-skies), **if you install other mods to increase the ore may lead to its lack of crushing Recipe**, if you have other module requirements can be submitted Issue or add the corresponding ore in the DataPack ore tag.

If Almost Unified is installed, it is recommended to go to config\almostunified\unify.json and add "end", "everbright", "everdawn" to the stoneStrata.



## Mods ore recipe optimization

Mods' ores do not produce corresponding cobblestone when they are crushed, Deepslate ores do not produce additional crushed ores.

Optimized to increase the corresponding cobblestone, Deepslate ore will produce an additional crushed ore.

![优化en.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wbPmjTi5/images/35f23c9e61a05159f9d253adbf453b7a311ffd82.png)



## Ore Unified Fix

Almost Unified ores will result in both Stone and Deepslate ores having two recipes at the same time.

After the fix, the recipes for Stone and Deepslate ores can be processed normally using the corresponding treatment.

![修复en.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wbPmjTi5/images/c384b8acc46cf3097c817c0da5bc7544967df448.png)
